global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a focus on travel booking options.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: This element features abstract geometric shapes, including a circle and a square, rendered in a soft blue color.

elements.label: Overlay shapes
elements.description: This element consists of overlapping geometric shapes, primarily in blue tones, creating a layered visual effect.

elements.label: Main message
elements.description: This text element displays a bold, modern font in white, conveying the message about travel destinations and booking options.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: This element features the brand name 'NomadLayer' in a large, bold font, prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Dream headline
elements.description: This text element reads 'Dream' in a stylish font, positioned centrally and designed to catch the viewer's attention.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: This element features the phrase 'Order now' in a clear, inviting font, encouraging immediate action from the viewer.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the headline, main message in the center, and the CTA at the bottom.
